title: PublishDescribeData
description:
`publish` (bare, no `--yes`) — the describe: where it lands, the gate outcome, the audience, the
share line, and the undo path. **INFERRED.**

bundle_digest.description: The byte-exact digest of the draft being published.

gate.description: The gate outcome: an OPEN bundle lands directly; a REVIEWED one becomes a proposal.

is_revert.description: Whether this publish restores an ancestor's bytes (a revert-shaped publish, same gate).

origin_note.description:
The origin-demotion disclosure for an imported skill (publishing makes the team copy the source
of truth).

placement_note.description:
The default placement's mode annotation: present when a brand-new skill's `everyone`
placement will be WITHHELD at the apply (the channel is curated and the caller is a
member) — the publish lands catalog-only and a curator places it afterwards. **INFERRED**
(additive-only).

placements.description: The channels the reference lands in (`--to`, or `everyone` for a brand-new skill).

reach.description: The audience the change reaches (people entitled to the skill), when the plane discloses it.

share_line.description: The paste-able share line (`<address>/skills/<name>`), when the workspace address is known.

undo.description: The undo path — the version `revert --to` restores to get back here.

PublishGate.description: The gate a `publish` describe predicts. **INFERRED value set.**

oneOf.description: The bundle is open — publishing moves `current` directly.
The bundle is reviewed — publishing opens a proposal instead of moving `current`.
